message:
test(e2e): add client session management E2E tests (bd-2ms)

Add comprehensive E2E tests for MCP client session lifecycle and
capability negotiation.

Session initialization tests:
- session_initialization_stores_server_info: Verify server info storage
- Pre-init state assertions (no server info, not initialized)
- Post-init state verification (all session data available)

Capability reflection tests:
- session_capabilities_reflect_server_handlers: Verify capability
  advertisement matches registered handlers
- Tools-only server: tools capability present, others absent
- Resources-only server: resources capability present, others absent
- Prompts-only server: prompts capability present, others absent

These tests ensure the client correctly tracks session state and
that capability negotiation accurately reflects server configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
